meta-runner.name: Generate Build Configuration Report
meta-runner.description: Depends on following TeamCity parameters: * env.BUILD_ENV

param.name: REPORTING_SERVICE_URL
param.spec: text description='Reporting Service URL' validationMode='not_empty' display='normal'

param.name: ROOT_PROJECT_ID
param.spec: text description='Root project ID' validationMode='not_empty' display='normal'

param.name: INCLUDE_SYSTEMS
param.spec: text description='Comma-separated list of systems to include' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: EXCLUDE_COMPONENTS
param.spec: text description='Comma-separated list of components to exclude' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: BUILD_STAGE
param.spec: text description='Build stage: BUILD, RELEASE_CANDIDATE, RELEASE' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: PARAMETERS
param.spec: text description='Comma-separated list of parameters to check' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: STEPS
param.spec: text description='Comma-separated list of steps to check' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: PUBLISH_TO_WIKI
param.spec: text description='Publish report to Confluence wiki' display='normal'

param.name: WIKI_REPORT_TEMPLATE
param.spec: text description='Wiki report Velocity template file path (classpath)' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: WIKI_PAGE_ID
param.spec: text description='Confluence page ID to update' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: WIKI_URL
param.spec: text description='Confluence base URL' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: WIKI_PASSWORD
param.spec: text description='Confluence password' validationMode='any' display='normal' displayStyle='hidden_password_hint'

param.name: CUSTOM_REPORT
param.spec: checkbox description='Generate custom report' uncheckedValue='false' checkedValue='true' display='normal'

param.name: CUSTOM_REPORT_TEMPLATE
param.spec: text description='Path to velocity template. Used only if CUSTOM_REPORT is enabled' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: CUSTOM_REPORT_FILE
param.spec: text description='Path to custom report file. Used only if CUSTOM_REPORT is enabled' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: CUSTOM_REPORT_ESCAPE_HTML
param.spec: checkbox description='Escape HTML symbols in custom report' uncheckedValue='false' checkedValue='true' display='normal'

param.name: JSON_REPORT_FILE
param.spec: text description='Path to json report file' validationMode='not_empty' display='normal'
